evidence.description: Served as one of seven members of the Cultural Revolution Committee appointed by Khomeini to close and restructure universities

evidence.source_title: The 1980 Cultural Revolution and Restrictions on Academic Freedom in Iran — IHRDC
evidence.description: The Cultural Revolution Institute was composed of seven members including Abdolkarim Soroush, all appointed directly by Ayatollah Khomeini

editorial_notes: One of the seven members of the Cultural Revolution Committee. Resigned 1983.
